vocab.meaning: một nguồn cảm hứng bất chợt
vocab.example: Choosing to study Architecture was a stroke of inspiration after I visited the ancient temples in central Vietnam.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ/ham học hỏi
vocab.example: My intellectual curiosity regarding how the human mind works led me to pursue a degree in Psychology.
I chose Biomedical Engineering because I wanted to bridge the gap between pure science and clinical medicine.

vocab.meaning: con đường sự nghiệp hái ra tiền/thu nhập cao
vocab.example: I can’t deny that the prospect of a lucrative career path in Investment Banking influenced my decision to major in Finance.

vocab.meaning: hướng tôi đến/dẫn dắt tôi đến
vocab.example: My high school counselor helped steer me towards Journalism after seeing my passion for storytelling.

vocab.meaning: khung lý thuyết/nền tảng lý luận
vocab.example: I wanted a subject that provided a solid theoretical framework for understanding global economic shifts.
The interdisciplinary approach of Data Science, combining math and social trends, really appealed to me.

vocab.meaning: có ích cho tôi trong tương lai
vocab.example: I knew that a degree in Law would stand me in good stead, regardless of which industry I eventually entered.

vocab.meaning: bề dày kinh nghiệm/kiến thức rộng
vocab.example: I chose Liberal Arts to ensure a certain breadth of experience before specializing in a more narrow field.

vocab.meaning: thiên hướng/nghề nghiệp mang tính sứ mệnh
vocab.example: For me, Nursing wasn't just a choice of study; it felt like a true vocation to help those in need.
